summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sovereign Genesis Platform (SGP) MVP - Neural-Symbolic reasoning engine with Socratic Pre-Prompt Engine. Backend APIs working perfectly, frontend integration excellent with beautiful DAG visualization.

resolved_bugs.issue: Pydantic object serialization error in conversation history
resolved_bugs.fix_applied: Convert ResolutionAnswer objects to dict before storing

ui_bugs.issue: Node inspector panel doesn't open when clicking nodes

passed_tests: API Health Check - Basic connectivity works
Socratic Engine Behavior - Correctly refuses direct answers
Ambiguity Structure - Well-formed JSON with all required fields
Initial Confidence Score - Appropriately low (5%) initially
Analyze Endpoint - Creates session with ambiguities
Confidence Improvement - Confidence increases after answering questions
Resolve Endpoint - Processes answers correctly
Generate Spec Endpoint (Low Confidence) - Correctly rejects when confidence too low
Session Retrieval - Can fetch session by ID and list sessions
Frontend Dark Theme - Proper dark minimalist theme implementation
Header Display - Shows 'SOVEREIGN GENESIS' correctly
Input Panel - Visible and functional
React Flow Canvas - Present and working with proper DAG visualization
Socratic Engine Integration - Full flow from prompt to ambiguities to resolutions
Ambiguity Nodes - Proper amber styling and CRITICAL priority display
Resolution Nodes - Proper emerald styling after answering questions
Clarification Panel - Shows questions with confidence score
Question Answering - Can select options and submit answers
Confidence Score Updates - Properly increases from 5% to 45.5% after answers
Claude Sonnet 4.5 Integration - LLM calls working correctly via emergentintegrations

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - minor node inspector issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix NodeInspector component - clicking nodes should open inspector panel with node details. This is a minor UI enhancement.
